one_line_summary: Exemplary submission: thorough ADR, atomic Lua-based Redis backend, complete API surface, and full adversarial + property test pass.
strengths: Atomic Lua scripts with Redis server time eliminate clock skew and lost-update races
ADR covers algorithm choice, log vs counter, Lua vs WATCH/MULTI/EXEC, and 3 rejected alternatives
Concurrency tests use threading.Barrier for true simultaneity; property tests assert real invariants
weaknesses: sliding-window-log memory is O(capacity) per key (acknowledged in ADR)
fail_open default could silently degrade without operator alerting
